doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely stating tenants have no right to cure and no court hearing before eviction, contradicting actual protections under the Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely stating tenants have no right to cure and no right to a hearing before eviction, contradicting the Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act which provides both protections.

REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely stating tenants have no right to cure and no court hearing before eviction, contradicting actual protections under the Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
